name: Dyson Bus Svc Inc

name: Hafermann Bus Co
carrier_operation: unknown (intrastate school bus, likely member of Prior Lake School Bus Association)
fmcsa_status: no USDOT (likely intrastate; operating under Prior Lake School Bus Association umbrella USDOT 945736)
registry_source: none located (MN SoS portal returned error)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under HAFERMANN or HAFERMAN. Input address 4933 Oak St SE, Prior Lake MN is in the same Prior Lake neighborhood as PRIOR LAKE SCHOOL BUS ASSOCIATION INC (USDOT 945736, 75 buses, 87 drivers, intrastate-only school bus carrier at 5823 Granite Ct SE, Prior Lake). Prior Lake operates through a cooperative of family owner-operators (e.g., Busse Student Transportation also a member). Hafermann Bus Co is consistent with a small family-owned member-operator within that association whose buses are registered under the association's USDOT, not as a standalone FMCSA registrant. MN Secretary of State portal threw error; could not confirm inc date/officers/status.
